response.justification: While the resume demonstrates strong technical expertise across multiple platforms and genuine developer tools experience (CI/CD, infrastructure, Docker), it critically lacks any people management or team leadership experience. The role requires a minimum of 2 years in people management or team leadership for a full-time people-leadership position, and the resume shows zero direct reports, team leadership, hiring decisions, or performance management responsibilities. The candidate remains in an individual contributor role despite achieving Staff-level titles, with no clear management trajectory.
strengths: 15+ years of software development across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems demonstrating deep technical breadth
Hands-on experience with developer tools and infrastructure (CI/CD, build systems, Docker, AWS CDK, GitLab administration)
Strong knowledge-sharing track record through workshops, technical talks, and mentoring via code reviews and Refactoring Dojos
concerns: Zero people management experience despite minimum 2-year requirement—no evidence of direct reports, team leadership, hiring, or performance reviews
Developer tools experience is fragmented across roles (2 years at Altom, 6 months at NI) rather than 3 sustained years on compilers, build systems, or test automation
No demonstrated organizational change leadership or strategic roadmap planning at scale; currently remains individual contributor despite Staff-level titles

key_factors.factor: Technical expertise and developer tools familiarity
